title: SARS-COV2 (VSV) Neutralization Assay
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs the SARS-COV2 (VSV) Neutralization Assay on the OT-2. The user may select how many source-destination plate pairs (1-3) for this protocol, as well as select labware. The protocol will pause if the tips are depleted, prompting the user to refill tips.
steps_raw: This protocol performs the SARS-COV2 (VSV) Neutralization Assay on the OT-2. The user may select how many source-destination plate pairs (1-3) for this protocol, as well as select labware. The protocol will pause if the tips are depleted, prompting the user to refill tips.
Transfer media from source plate to destination plate
